title: PII Detector and Redactor
constraints: You must redact PII from the agent's output before it reaches the user
At minimum, detect and redact email addresses and phone numbers
The rest of the response must remain intact and useful
hints: Regular expressions for common email and phone patterns can catch most PII
Apply redaction as a post-processing step on the agent's output
Replace detected PII with placeholder tokens like [EMAIL_REDACTED] or [PHONE_REDACTED]

starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
from agents.tool import function_tool

@function_tool
def lookup_customer(name: str) -> str:
    """Look up customer details by name."""
    return (
        f"Customer: {name}\n"
        f"Email: alice@example.com\n"
        f"Phone: 555-867-5309\n"
        f"Status: Active"
    )

# BUG: The agent returns raw PII (email, phone) with no redaction
agent = Agent(
    name="Customer Lookup",
    instructions="You are a customer lookup assistant. Return the customer details you find.",
    tools=[lookup_customer],
)

result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Find the details for Alice")
print(result.final_output)
starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_tool_calling_agent
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.tools import tool

@tool
def lookup_customer(name: str) -> str:
    """Look up customer details by name."""
    return (
        f"Customer: {name}\n"
        f"Email: alice@example.com\n"
        f"Phone: 555-867-5309\n"
        f"Status: Active"
    )

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a customer lookup assistant. Return the customer details you find."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
    ("placeholder", "{agent_scratchpad}"),
])

# BUG: The agent returns raw PII (email, phone) with no redaction
agent = create_tool_calling_agent(llm, [lookup_customer], prompt)
executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=[lookup_customer])

result = executor.invoke({"input": "Find the details for Alice"})
print(result["output"])
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai.tools import tool

@tool
def lookup_customer(name: str) -> str:
    """Look up customer details by name."""
    return (
        f"Customer: {name}\n"
        f"Email: alice@example.com\n"
        f"Phone: 555-867-5309\n"
        f"Status: Active"
    )

# BUG: The agent returns raw PII (email, phone) with no redaction
lookup_agent = Agent(
    role="Customer Lookup",
    goal="Look up customer details and return them",
    backstory="You are a customer lookup assistant. Return the customer details you find.",
    tools=[lookup_customer],
)

task = Task(
    description="Find the details for Alice",
    expected_output="Customer details for Alice",
    agent=lookup_agent,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[lookup_agent], tasks=[task])
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: Email addresses are redacted
evaluationCriteria.description: All email addresses in the output are replaced with a redaction placeholder

evaluationCriteria.label: Phone numbers are redacted
evaluationCriteria.description: All phone numbers in the output are replaced with a redaction placeholder

evaluationCriteria.label: Non-PII content preserved
evaluationCriteria.description: The rest of the agent's response remains useful and coherent after redaction
